phrases.intent_en: Ask where ferry to beach departs
phrases.text_local: Onde embarca no ferry para a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee em-BAR-kah noo FE-ree PA-rah ah PRAH-yah (liaison: PA-rah-ah)
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry services operate from the marina pier to the island beaches.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o ferry sai junto ao cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW FEH-ree SEYE ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the ferry departs next to the pier.

responses.english: Good morning, the ferry departs next to the pier.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW FEH-ree SEYE ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH.
responses.french: Bom dia, o ferry sai junto ao cais.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where ferry to beach departs
phrases.text_local: Onde é que o ferry para a praia parte?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH AW FEH-ree PUH-ruh AH PREYEUH PAH-ruh-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Cais da Ilha is the main pier for ferry access to the beach island.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, parte do Cais da Ilha.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, PAH-ruh-tih DOO KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it departs from Cais da Ilha.

responses.english: Good morning, it departs from Cais da Ilha.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, PAH-ruh-tih DOO KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh.
responses.french: Bom dia, parte do Cais da Ilha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Passadiço das Dunas starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o Passadiço das Dunas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The boardwalk begins near the shoreline and runs parallel to the dunes.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Passadiço das Dunas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Passadiço das Dunas.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Passadiço das Dunas.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo DUHSH DOO-nuhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Passadiço das Dunas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Farol de Faro
phrases.text_local: Como se chega ao Farol de Faro?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SIH SHEH-guh OW fuh-RAWL DIH FAH-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The elevated wooden path provides direct access to the historic lighthouse.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga o passadiço até ao farol.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo uh-TEH OW fuh-RAWL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the wooden walkway to the lighthouse.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the wooden walkway to the lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh AW puh-suh-DEE-soo uh-TEH OW fuh-RAWL.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga o passadiço até ao farol.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso apanhar o ferry para a ilha?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-pahn-NYAHR AW FEH-ree PUH-ruh AH EE-lyuh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ilha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Island Pier.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Island Pier.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW KEYESH DUH EE-lyuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Cais da Ilha.

phrases.text_local: Onde ficam os quiosques de aluguer de chapéus-de-sol?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh FEE-kahng oosh (s→sh) KYO-sh-keesh deh ah-loo-GAYR deh shah-PAY-oo-z (s→z) deh sol
phrases.cultural_note: Rental kiosks are seasonal and positioned along the main beachfront walkway.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, os quiosques ficam junto ao calçadão.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh FEE-kuhng ZHOONNG-too OW kahl-suh-DOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the kiosks are located next to the promenade.

responses.english: Good morning, the kiosks are located next to the promenade.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh FEE-kuhng ZHOONNG-too OW kahl-suh-DOWN.
responses.french: Bom dia, os quiosques ficam junto ao calçadão.
